metadata.description: A marketplace for custom plugins and skills

plugins.name: ado
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration with work item management, PR publishing, iterative PR tending, and end-to-end work item implementation skills, plus a DevOps workflow assistant agent.

plugins.name: developer-performance-review
plugins.description: Developer performance review skill for analyzing work over time (weeks/months)

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Code review toolkit with specialized agents for duplicate detection, EUII leak scanning, design simplification, code simplification, and log review. Includes a review-pr command that auto-detects tech stack and publishes findings to Azure DevOps.

plugins.name: orleans-dev
plugins.description: Microsoft Orleans patterns, best practices, and code review for virtual actor model applications — covers grain design, concurrency, cross-grain communication, streams, and serialization.

plugins.name: clean-builds
plugins.description: Achieve zero-warning builds through systematic warning elimination, code formatting, and package version validation

plugins.name: debugging
plugins.description: Log-first debugging methodology using structured JSONL logs queried with DuckDB. Includes debugging workflows, logging enablement for codebases, and logging compliance review.
